hero.title: 苹果WWDC 2026：Siri底层全面切换Gemini，AI助手进入「自选模型」时代
hero.title_en: Apple WWDC 2026: Siri Switches to Gemini, AI Assistants Enter 'Choose Your Own Model' Era
hero.summary: 苹果WWDC 2026重磅宣布Siri底层AI引擎全面切换至Google Gemini，用户可在Gemini/ChatGPT/Claude三选一。苹果成为全球首个允许用户「自选模型」的消费级平台，标志着从「一款模型」到「模型商店」的范式转变。
hero.summary_en: Apple WWDC 2026 announces Siri's complete AI engine switch to Google Gemini, with users able to choose between Gemini, ChatGPT, and Claude. Apple becomes the first consumer platform to offer 'choose your own AI model,' marking a paradigm shift from 'one model' to 'model store.'
hero.content:
6月19日，苹果WWDC 2026正式发布Siri的重大战略转型——底层AI引擎全面切换至Google Gemini（1.2万亿参数）。

用户可以在Gemini、ChatGPT、Claude三个顶级AI模型中自由选择，苹果成为全球首个允许用户「自选模型」的消费级平台。

Gemini作为Siri默认引擎，标志着苹果与Google的合作从搜索引擎延伸至AI领域。ChatGPT和Claude作为备选，用户可在设置中一键切换。

这一改变意味着：消费级AI产品正式从「厂商绑定」走向「用户自主选择」，AI平台的「操作系统化」趋势加速。
hero.content_en:
June 19, Apple WWDC 2026 officially announced Siri's major strategic transformation — the underlying AI engine fully switches to Google Gemini (1.2 trillion parameters).

Users can freely choose between three top-tier AI models: Gemini, ChatGPT, and Claude. Apple becomes the world's first consumer platform allowing users to 'choose their own model.'

Gemini as Siri's default engine marks Apple's partnership with Google extending from search engines to AI. ChatGPT and Claude serve as alternatives, switchable with one tap.

This change signifies: consumer AI products officially moving from 'vendor lock-in' to 'user autonomy,' and the 'operating system-ization' of AI platforms accelerates.
key_points: Siri底层全面切换Gemini（1.2万亿参数）
用户可在Gemini/ChatGPT/Claude三选一
苹果成为首个允许「自选模型」的消费级平台
Gemini成为Siri默认引擎
AI产品从「厂商绑定」走向「用户自主选择」
key_points_en: Siri fully switches to Gemini (1.2 trillion parameters)
Users can choose between Gemini, ChatGPT, and Claude
Apple becomes first consumer platform with 'choose your own model'
Gemini becomes Siri's default engine
AI products shift from 'vendor lock-in' to 'user autonomy'

articles.title: 「AI教父」杨立昆警告：马斯克xAI已「失败」，行业或迎泡沫大爆炸
articles.title_en: AI Pioneer LeCun Warns: Musk's xAI 'Failed', Industry May Face Bubble Explosion
articles.summary: 图灵奖得主、Meta首席AI科学家杨立昆在接受CNBC专访时直言xAI已是一次失败尝试，并警告全行业若不快速调整策略，AI估值泡沫将迎来集中出清。
articles.summary_en: Turing Award winner and Meta Chief AI Scientist Yann LeCun tells CNBC xAI has been a failed attempt, warning the entire industry faces concentrated bubble clearing without rapid strategic adjustment.
articles.content:
6月18日，杨立昆接受CNBC独家专访，抛出两大极具冲击力的观点：马斯克旗下xAI从底层发展逻辑上已经宣告失败；全行业AI企业若不快速调整经营策略，一轮大规模估值泡沫破裂或将到来。

杨立昆指出xAI三大核心硬伤：核心创始团队集体出走、持续巨额亏损只能靠出租算力回血、产品竞争力长期落后同行。
articles.content_en: On June 18, LeCun gave an exclusive CNBC interview, delivering two highly impactful viewpoints: xAI has failed from its fundamental development logic; and without rapid operational strategy adjustment, the entire AI industry may face concentrated bubble clearing.
key_points: 杨立昆：xAI已是一次失败尝试
三大硬伤：人才流失、巨额亏损、产品竞争力断层
警告全行业：估值泡沫或将集中出清
仅存两条出路：涨价或裁员
key_points_en: LeCun: xAI has been a failed attempt
Three core issues: talent drain, massive losses, product competitiveness gap
Warning: AI valuation bubble may face concentrated clearing
Only two paths: raise prices or cut jobs

articles.title: Google I/O 2026：Gemini 3.5 Flash速度提升4倍，AI Ultra降价60%
articles.title_en: Google I/O 2026: Gemini 3.5 Flash 4x Faster, AI Ultra Drops 60%
articles.summary: Google在I/O 2026上发布Gemini 3.5 Flash，速度提升4倍；AI Ultra订阅从250美元砍至100美元/月，直接对标ChatGPT Pro。
articles.summary_en: Google launches Gemini 3.5 Flash with 4x speed improvement at I/O 2026; AI Ultra subscription drops from $250 to $100/month, directly competing with ChatGPT Pro.
articles.content:
Google I/O 2026开发者大会上，Google发布Gemini 3.5 Flash，相比上一代速度提升4倍，同时大幅降低延迟。

同时，Google将AI Ultra订阅价格从250美元砍至100美元/月，直接对标OpenAI的ChatGPT Pro（200美元/月）。AI大模型的价格战持续升级。
articles.content_en:
At Google I/O 2026, Google launched Gemini 3.5 Flash with 4x speed improvement over the previous generation while significantly reducing latency.

Meanwhile, Google cut AI Ultra subscription from $250 to $100/month, directly competing with OpenAI's ChatGPT Pro ($200/month). The AI large model price war continues to escalate.
key_points: Gemini 3.5 Flash速度提升4倍
AI Ultra从250美元降至100美元/月
直接对标ChatGPT Pro
AI大模型价格战持续
key_points_en: Gemini 3.5 Flash 4x speed improvement
AI Ultra drops from $250 to $100/month
Direct competition with ChatGPT Pro
AI LLM price war continues

articles.title: OpenAI发布Dreaming记忆系统，ChatGPT更「懂你」了
articles.title_en: OpenAI Launches Dreaming Memory System, ChatGPT Knows You Better
articles.summary: OpenAI发布Dreaming记忆系统，ChatGPT可以在对话中主动学习和记住用户偏好，实现更个性化的交互体验。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI launches Dreaming memory system, enabling ChatGPT to actively learn and remember user preferences for more personalized interactions.
articles.content:
OpenAI在WWDC同期发布Dreaming记忆系统，这是一项让ChatGPT能够跨对话学习和记住用户偏好的技术创新。

用户不再需要每次重复说明自己的需求和习惯，ChatGPT会主动学习和适应，提供更懂你的个性化服务。
articles.content_en:
OpenAI launched the Dreaming memory system alongside WWDC, a technology enabling ChatGPT to learn and remember user preferences across conversations.

Users no longer need to repeat their needs and habits each time. ChatGPT will actively learn and adapt, providing more personalized service that truly understands you.
key_points: Dreaming记忆系统发布
ChatGPT跨对话学习和记忆用户偏好
实现更个性化交互体验
用户无需每次重复说明需求
key_points_en: Dreaming memory system launched
ChatGPT learns and remembers user preferences across conversations
Enables more personalized interaction experience
Users no longer need to repeat needs each time

articles.title: Anthropic收购Coefficient Bio，进军AI制药领域
articles.title_en: Anthropic Acquires Coefficient Bio, Enters AI Drug Discovery
articles.summary: Anthropic宣布收购生物科技公司Coefficient Bio，正式进军AI制药领域，Claude的能力将应用于药物研发流程。
articles.summary_en: Anthropic announces acquisition of biotech company Coefficient Bio, officially entering AI drug discovery, with Claude's capabilities to be applied in drug development.
articles.content:
Anthropic宣布收购生物科技初创公司Coefficient Bio，标志着这家AI安全公司正式进军AI制药领域。

Coefficient Bio专注于利用AI加速药物研发流程，Anthropic的Claude模型将被应用于蛋白质折叠预测、药物分子设计等关键环节。
articles.content_en:
Anthropic announced the acquisition of biotech startup Coefficient Bio, marking the AI safety company's official entry into AI drug discovery.

Coefficient Bio focuses on using AI to accelerate drug development processes. Anthropic's Claude model will be applied in protein folding prediction, drug molecule design, and other key stages.
key_points: Anthropic收购Coefficient Bio
正式进军AI制药领域
Claude应用于蛋白质折叠预测
AI制药成新战场
key_points_en: Anthropic acquires Coefficient Bio
Officially enters AI drug discovery
Claude applied in protein folding prediction
AI drug discovery becomes new battlefield

articles.title: 费城半导体指数暴涨6.41%，英特尔股价创历史新高
articles.title_en: Philadelphia Semiconductor Index Surges 6.41%, Intel Hits All-Time High
articles.summary: 受AI算力需求持续旺盛推动，费城半导体指数暴涨6.41%，英特尔股价飙升11%创历史新高。6月CPI升至4.2%，但油价回落缓解加息恐慌。
articles.summary_en: Driven by sustained strong AI computing demand, Philadelphia Semiconductor Index surges 6.41%, Intel stock soars 11% to all-time high. June CPI rises to 4.2%, but oil price decline eases rate hike fears.
articles.content:
费城半导体指数暴涨6.41%，英特尔领涨11%创历史新高。分析师指出，AI算力需求持续旺盛是推动半导体板块上涨的核心动力。

6月CPI数据升至4.2%，但国际油价回落一定程度上缓解了市场对加息的担忧。
articles.content_en:
Philadelphia Semiconductor Index surges 6.41%, with Intel leading the rally at 11% to hit an all-time high. Analysts point to sustained strong AI computing demand as the core driver for the semiconductor sector rally.

June CPI data rose to 4.2%, but declining international oil prices eased market concerns about interest rate hikes to some extent.

英特尔股价飙升11%创历史新高
AI算力需求推动半导体板块
6月CPI升至4.2%
key_points_en: Philadelphia Semiconductor Index surges 6.41%
Intel soars 11% to all-time high
AI computing demand drives semiconductor sector
June CPI rises to 4.2%

articles.title: 智谱与MiniMax两级分化：「多智谱、空MiniMax」配对交易兴起
articles.title_en: Zhipu vs MiniMax Divergence: 'Long Zhipu, Short MiniMax' Pairs Trade Emerges
articles.summary: 中国AI大模型赛道多空博弈加剧。智谱因盈利预期看好、定价能力强劲，股价大涨；MiniMax因降价导致评级下调，「多智谱、空MiniMax」配对交易成为华尔街新策略。
articles.summary_en: China AI LLM track long-short divergence intensifies. Zhipu surges on positive profit outlook and strong pricing power; MiniMax downgraded due to price cuts. 'Long Zhipu, Short MiniMax' pairs trade becomes Wall Street's new strategy.
articles.content:
中国AI大模型赛道出现明显分化。智谱因盈利预期改善、API定价能力强劲，股价持续上涨；而MiniMax因大幅降价导致利润空间压缩，评级遭到下调。

华尔街开始流行「多智谱、空MiniMax」的配对交易策略，反映出市场对中国AI大模型商业化前景的分歧。
articles.content_en:
China's AI LLM sector shows clear divergence. Zhipu continues rising on improved profit expectations and strong API pricing power; while MiniMax faces downgrades due to margin compression from aggressive price cuts.

Wall Street is embracing 'Long Zhipu, Short MiniMax' pairs trading strategy, reflecting market divergence on Chinese AI LLM commercialization prospects.
key_points: 智谱股价上涨，盈利预期改善
MiniMax因降价导致评级下调
「多智谱、空MiniMax」配对交易兴起
中国AI大模型商业化分歧加大
key_points_en: Zhipu stock rises, profit outlook improves
MiniMax downgraded due to price cuts
'Long Zhipu, Short MiniMax' pairs trade emerges
Chinese AI LLM commercialization divergence widens

articles.title: AI独立完成首个重大科学发现，登上《自然》封面
articles.title_en: AI Completes First Major Scientific Discovery Independently, Featured on Nature Cover
articles.summary: AI首次独立完成重大科学发现登上《自然》封面——发现新型蛋白质折叠模式，有望用于治疗帕金森等神经退行性疾病。
articles.summary_en: AI completes first major scientific discovery independently, featured on Nature cover — discovering new protein folding patterns with potential for treating Parkinson's and other neurodegenerative diseases.
articles.content:
一个AI研究团队宣布，其AI系统首次独立完成重大科学发现并发表在《自然》期刊上——发现了一种新型蛋白质折叠模式，这一发现有望用于开发治疗帕金森等神经退行性疾病的新方法。

这是人类首次验证AI可以在无人主导的情况下完成重大科学突破，标志着AI科学家的角色正在发生根本性转变。
articles.content_en:
An AI research team announced their AI system independently completed a major scientific discovery published in Nature — discovering a new protein folding pattern with potential for developing treatments for Parkinson's and other neurodegenerative diseases.

This is the first time humanity has verified that AI can complete major scientific breakthroughs without human leadership, marking a fundamental shift in the role of AI scientists.
key_points: AI首次独立完成重大科学发现
发表在《自然》期刊封面
发现新型蛋白质折叠模式
有望用于治疗帕金森等疾病
标志AI科学家角色转变
key_points_en: AI completes first major scientific discovery independently
Featured on Nature journal cover
Discovers new protein folding pattern
Potential for treating Parkinson's and other diseases
Marks fundamental shift in AI scientist role

articles.title: MiniMax稀疏注意力机制实现百万Token近线性计算
articles.title_en: MiniMax Sparse Attention Achieves Near-Linear Computation for 1M Tokens
articles.summary: MiniMax发布技术创新，其稀疏注意力机制实现百万Token上下文近线性计算复杂度，大幅降低长文本处理成本。
articles.summary_en: MiniMax releases technological innovation — sparse attention mechanism achieves near-linear computational complexity for 1 million token context, significantly reducing long-text processing costs.
articles.content:
MiniMax发布技术创新成果，其稀疏注意力机制实现了百万Token上下文近线性计算复杂度突破。

这意味着处理超长文档的成本将大幅降低，为长文本分析、长程推理等应用场景扫清障碍。
articles.content_en:
MiniMax released technological innovation results — its sparse attention mechanism achieved near-linear computational complexity breakthrough for 1 million token context.

This means processing ultra-long documents will be significantly cheaper, clearing obstacles for long-text analysis and long-horizon reasoning application scenarios.
key_points: MiniMax稀疏注意力机制突破
百万Token近线性计算
大幅降低长文本处理成本
长程推理应用获益
key_points_en: MiniMax sparse attention mechanism breakthrough
Near-linear computation for 1M tokens
Significantly reduces long-text processing costs
Long-horizon reasoning applications benefit

articles.title: 陆家嘴论坛：科创板扩容覆盖AI全产业链
articles.title_en: Lujiazui Forum: STAR Market Expansion Covers Full AI Industry Chain
articles.summary: 2026陆家嘴论坛传来重磅信号，科创板第五套上市标准已覆盖AI全产业链，从芯片到应用的全链条企业均可登陆资本市场。
articles.summary_en: Major signal from 2026 Lujiazui Forum — STAR Market fifth listing standard now covers full AI industry chain, from chips to applications.
articles.content:
2026陆家嘴论坛传来重磅信号，证监会正式确认科创板第五套上市标准已扩展至AI全产业链。

这意味着从底层芯片、算力基础设施、大模型研发到行业应用，整个AI产业链的企业均可享受科创板第五套标准的便利，境内AI企业上市通道彻底打开。
articles.content_en:
Major signal from 2026 Lujiazui Forum — CSRC officially confirmed STAR Market fifth listing standard expanded to cover full AI industry chain.

This means companies across the entire AI industry chain — from underlying chips and computing infrastructure to LLM R&D and industry applications — can all enjoy STAR Market fifth standard conveniences. Domestic AI company listing channels are fully opened.
key_points: 科创板第五套标准覆盖AI全产业链
芯片到应用全链条企业均可上市
境内AI企业上市通道彻底打开
AI资本市场利好持续
key_points_en: STAR Market fifth standard covers full AI industry chain
Companies from chips to applications can all IPO
Domestic AI company listing channels fully opened
AI capital market benefits continue

articles.title: 商务部等八部门发文：17项举措推进「人工智能+消费」
articles.title_en: 8 Ministries Issue 17 Measures to Promote 'AI + Consumption'
articles.summary: 商务部等八部门发布《关于加快「人工智能+消费」发展的实施意见》，提出17项举措促进AI走进千家万户、进千商万店。
articles.summary_en: Ministry of Commerce and 7 other departments issue 'Implementation Opinions on Accelerating AI + Consumption Development,' proposing 17 measures to promote AI into thousands of households and businesses.
articles.content:
商务部等八部门6月18日发布《关于加快「人工智能+消费」发展的实施意见》，围绕提升AI+商品消费、发展AI+服务消费、培育AI消费新业态等五方面提出17项举措。

政策明确要推动智能终端供给、人形机器人及全场景生态发展，覆盖养老、文旅等五大服务场景。
articles.content_en:
Ministry of Commerce and 7 other departments issued 'Implementation Opinions on Accelerating AI + Consumption Development' on June 18, proposing 17 measures across five areas including AI+ product consumption, AI+ service consumption, and new AI consumption formats.

The policy explicitly promotes intelligent terminal supply, humanoid robots and full-scenario ecosystem development, covering elderly care, cultural tourism, and four other service scenarios.
key_points: 八部门联合发布17项AI+消费举措
推动智能终端和人形机器人发展
覆盖养老、文旅等五大服务场景
AI走进千家万户政策加码
key_points_en: 8 departments jointly issue 17 AI + consumption measures
Promote intelligent terminals and humanoid robots
Cover elderly care, cultural tourism, four other service scenarios
Policy intensifies to bring AI into thousands of households

hero.title: Transformer之父Noam Shazeer跳槽OpenAI，大模型架构战再升级
hero.title_en: Transformer Co-Author Noam Shazeer Jumps to OpenAI, Architecture War Escalates
hero.summary: Transformer论文作者之一、谷歌DeepMind工程副总裁兼Gemini联合负责人Noam Shazeer正式宣布离开谷歌加入OpenAI，担任架构研究负责人。这是继前Gemini产品负责人后，谷歌AI团队又一核心人才流失，标志着大模型架构探索战再度升级。同日，WAIC 2026确认7月17-20日在上海举办，超300款AI产品全球首发。
hero.summary_en: Noam Shazeer, co-author of the Transformer paper, Google DeepMind VP of Engineering and Gemini co-lead, officially announced his departure from Google to join OpenAI as Head of Architecture Research. This marks another core talent loss for Google's AI team, signaling an escalation in the battle for next-generation model architecture.
hero.content:
6月18日，AI行业上演了一场震动硅谷的「人才地震」——Transformer论文作者之一、谷歌DeepMind工程副总裁兼Gemini联合负责人Noam Shazeer正式宣布离开谷歌、加入OpenAI，将担任架构研究负责人。

Shazeer是2017年Transformer论文「Attention Is All You Need」的核心作者之一，在谷歌主导了多个大模型项目。他的离开被视为谷歌AI人才流失的标志性事件，也意味着OpenAI在下一代模型架构上获得了关键人才。

同日，国务院新闻办公室披露WAIC 2026将于7月17-20日在上海举办，超300款AI产品全球首发；上交所将科创板第五套上市标准扩至AI大模型企业，资本市场反应积极。
hero.content_en:
On June 18, the AI industry witnessed a 'talent earthquake' rocking Silicon Valley: Noam Shazeer, co-author of the Transformer paper and Google DeepMind's VP of Engineering, officially announced his departure from Google to join OpenAI as Head of Architecture Research.

Shazeer was one of the core authors of the 2017 'Attention Is All You Need' paper and led multiple large model projects at Google. His departure is seen as a landmark event in Google's AI talent drain, and means OpenAI has acquired key talent for next-generation model architecture.
key_points: Transformer论文作者Noam Shazeer离开谷歌加入OpenAI
将担任OpenAI架构研究负责人
谷歌AI团队核心人才持续流失
WAIC 2026确认7月上海举办，超300款AI产品首发
科创板第五套上市标准扩至AI大模型企业
key_points_en: Transformer paper co-author Noam Shazeer leaves Google for OpenAI
Will serve as OpenAI Head of Architecture Research
Continued core talent drain from Google's AI team
WAIC 2026 confirmed for July in Shanghai, 300+ AI products debuting
STAR Market extends listing standards to AI large-model companies

articles.title: OpenAI与Anthropic先后提交IPO申请，AI巨头竞速上市
articles.title_en: OpenAI and Anthropic File IPO Applications, AI Giants Race to Go Public
articles.summary: OpenAI在Anthropic提交保密IPO申请数日后跟进，双方竞逐2026年秋季上市窗口，与SpaceX共同构成三大潜在万亿级AI上市企业。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI followed Anthropic's confidential IPO filing days later, both competing for fall 2026 listing windows, joining SpaceX as three potential trillion-dollar AI IPOs.
articles.content_en: OpenAI and Anthropic have both filed IPO applications, competing for the fall 2026 listing window alongside SpaceX as three potential trillion-dollar AI public offerings. This marks a significant milestone in the AI industry's transition from private venture-backed companies to publicly traded giants.
key_points_en: OpenAI and Anthropic file IPO applications, competing for fall 2026 listing windows
SpaceX joins as third potential trillion-dollar AI IPO
AI giants transitioning from private venture-backed to publicly traded companies

articles.title: Anthropic发布最强公开模型Claude Fable 5
articles.title_en: Anthropic Releases Most Powerful Public Model Claude Fable 5
articles.summary: Anthropic推出Mythos级别的Claude Fable 5，在软件工程、知识工作、视觉和科学推理等长程复杂任务上达到行业领先，Stripe测试显示其可在一天内完成5000万行Ruby代码库迁移。
articles.summary_en: Anthropic launched Mythos-level Claude Fable 5, achieving industry-leading performance in software engineering, knowledge work, vision and scientific reasoning. Stripe tests showed it can complete a 50M-line Ruby codebase migration in one day.
articles.content_en: Anthropic launched Claude Fable 5, achieving industry-leading performance in software engineering, knowledge work, vision, and scientific reasoning on long-horizon complex tasks. Stripe tests demonstrated that Claude Fable 5 can complete a 50 million-line Ruby codebase migration within a single day.
key_points_en: Claude Fable 5 achieves industry-leading performance in software engineering and scientific reasoning

hero.title: FF发布全尺寸人形机器人Futurist 2，贾跃亭跨界入局具身智能
hero.title_en: FF Unveils Full-Size Humanoid Robot Futurist 2, Jia Yueting Embarks on Embodied AI
hero.summary: 贾跃亭于6月17日正式发布FF Futurist 2全尺寸人形机器人，标志着电动汽车厂商全面进入人形机器人赛道。Futurist 2采用自研「神经元控制引擎」，支持双足直立行走与全地形适应。同时，智源大会共识显示未来2-3年是具身智能商用关键窗口，资本端白热化——百亿估值已成为新常态，400亿估值也浮出水面。
hero.summary_en: Jia Yueting officially released FF Futurist 2 full-size humanoid robot on June 17, marking EV manufacturers' full entry into humanoid robotics. Futurist 2 features self-developed 'Neural Control Engine' supporting bipedal upright walking and all-terrain adaptation. Meanwhile, Zhiyuan Conference consensus shows 2-3 years as key window for embodied AI commercialization, with capital heating up — $10B+ valuations becoming new normal and $40B valuations emerging.
hero.source: 财新网 / 钛媒体 / 凤凰科技
hero.content:
6月17日，FF（Faraday Future）正式发布Futurist 2全尺寸人形机器人，标志着这家电动汽车厂商正式跨界进入人形机器人赛道。

Futurist 2采用FF自研的「神经元控制引擎」，支持双足直立行走与全地形适应，可实现复杂动作的自主规划与执行。贾跃亭在发布会上表示：「人形机器人是下一个万亿级赛道，FF不仅要造车，更要造人。」

这一发布紧随行业共识。在北京智源大会上，银河通用创始人王鹤、星海图等头部创业者一致判断：未来2-3年是具身智能走向规模化商用的关键期。产业端「窗口期」共识正在形成，技术突破和商业落地的时间差越来越短。

资本层面同样白热化。据财新报道：千寻智能2个月内完成三轮融资，估值超百亿元；灵心巧手近期寻求400亿元估值新一轮融资。创业密度在「上桌or出局」的紧迫感下急剧攀升。

FF等跨界入局者的出现进一步验证了赛道热度已从垂直领域扩散到全科技行业。人形机器人正从实验室走向真实场景，从技术demo走向生产环境验证。
hero.content_en:
On June 17, FF (Faraday Future) officially released Futurist 2 full-size humanoid robot, marking the EV manufacturer's formal entry into the humanoid robotics sector.

Futurist 2 features FF's self-developed 'Neural Control Engine' supporting bipedal upright walking and all-terrain adaptation, enabling autonomous planning and execution of complex actions. Jia Yueting stated at the launch: 'Humanoid robots are the next trillion-dollar track. FF not only builds cars, but also builds humans.'

This release follows industry consensus. At the Beijing Zhiyuan Conference, founders of leading companies like Galaxy General and Xinghaitu agreed: the next 2-3 years are the critical window for embodied AI commercialization. Industry consensus on the 'window period' is forming, with the time gap between technological breakthroughs and commercial deployment shrinking.

The capital side is equally heating up. According to Caixin: Qianxun Intelligence completed three financing rounds in two months with valuation over 10 billion RMB; Lingxinqiaoshou is seeking new funding at 40 billion RMB valuation. Startup density is climbing sharply under the urgency of 'get to the table or exit'.

The emergence of cross-border entrants like FF further validates that track popularity has spread from vertical sectors to the entire tech industry. Humanoid robots are moving from labs to real scenes, from technical demos to production environment validation.
